breakdown: This PR ports CodeRabbit fallback logic to GitHub Actions workflow files, enabling status+comment-based approval when formal CR review objects are unavailable. The changes improve error handling with explicit exit code checks and pipefail guards, and add clearer status signaling via the CR_SIGNAL variable. The workflow architecture is coherent with proper fallback ordering, and comments explain the rationale for the multi-signal approach. However, there are no tests for these workflow changes, and shell scripting limits type safety.
key_changes: Added error handling with set +e -o pipefail and exit code checks around gh api calls in Gate-3
Introduced CR_SIGNAL variable to track granular CR approval state (APPROVED, ERROR, FAIL, status+comment)
Added fallback logic: if no formal CR review, check CodeRabbit status and [approve] comment
Expanded user login filter from 'coderabbitai[bot]' to also include 'coderabbitai'
Added diagnostic echo statements showing GATE-3 PASS/FAIL with signal reason
